response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior full-stack engineer with roughly 19 years of experience, genuine open-source contributions, and founder experience through GISCollective, which technically satisfies the 15-year minimum and entrepreneurial preference. However, the role is a director-level AI strategy position requiring recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI-built products; the candidate's AI exposure is limited to recent MCP tooling and agentic-workflow infrastructure work, with no ML background, no advanced degree, and no track record of engineering leadership at principal/director scope or of advising strategic customers.
strengths: 19+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of an open-source geo-data platform used in production by NGOs
Active knowledge-sharing through conference talks, workshops, and maintained open-source libraries
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML depth or recognized AI expertise beyond recent MCP/agent tooling contributions
Career has been senior/staff IC delivery roles, not principal-level strategy, customer advisory, or org-wide technical leadership
No advanced degree in an AI-related field and limited evidence of large-scale cloud platform strategy work

key_factors.factor: AI expertise gap vs. core role focus
Long, versatile engineering experience with founder background
